items.prompt: Elige la forma con inversión correcta:
options: Not only did she resign, but she also sued the firm.
Not only she resigned, but she also sued the firm.
Not only resigned she, but she also sued the firm.
items.value: Not only did she resign, but she also sued the firm.

items.prompt: Completa la inversión enfática:
items.text: Not only ___ he apologize, but he also paid for the damage.
accepted: did
items.value: did

items.prompt: Elige la forma con inversión correcta:
options: Rarely have I seen such a compelling argument.
Rarely I have seen such a compelling argument.
Rarely seen I have such a compelling argument.
items.value: Rarely have I seen such a compelling argument.

items.prompt: Ordena (inversión): "Rara vez había yo presenciado tanta tensión."
items.value: Seldom had I witnessed such tension

items.prompt: Completa la inversión enfática:
items.text: Never before ___ we faced a challenge of this magnitude.
accepted: had
items.value: had

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: Rarely have I encountered such reluctance.
Rarely I have encountered such reluctance.
Rare have I encountered such reluctance.
items.value: Rarely have I encountered such reluctance.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: Not only did the report mislead the board, but it also downplayed the risks.

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés usando énfasis (cleft/inversión): "Rara vez he visto tanto entusiasmo."
items.source: Rara vez he visto tanto entusiasmo.
items.value: Rarely have I seen such enthusiasm.
accepted: Rarely have I seen such enthusiasm.
Seldom have I seen such enthusiasm.
Rarely have I seen so much enthusiasm.

items.prompt: Elige la forma con inversión correcta:
options: Hardly had I sat down when the phone rang.
Hardly I had sat down when the phone rang.
Hardly had I sat down than the phone rang.
items.value: Hardly had I sat down when the phone rang.

items.prompt: Completa la inversión enfática:
items.text: No sooner had the meeting begun ___ a dispute broke out.
accepted: than
items.value: than

items.prompt: Arma la frase enfática: "Apenas había llegado cuando empezó a llover."
Ordena (inversión): "Apenas habían terminado de hablar cuando estalló el aplauso."
items.value: Hardly had they finished speaking when applause erupted

items.prompt: Elige la forma con inversión correcta:
options: No sooner had we left than the storm hit.
No sooner we had left than the storm hit.
No sooner had we left when the storm hit.
items.value: No sooner had we left than the storm hit.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: No sooner had he spoken than he regretted it.
No sooner he had spoken than he regretted it.
No sooner had he spoken when he regretted it.
items.value: No sooner had he spoken than he regretted it.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: Hardly had the negotiations resumed when both sides walked out again.

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés usando énfasis (cleft/inversión): "Apenas había colgado cuando volvió a sonar."
items.source: Apenas había colgado cuando volvió a sonar.
items.value: Hardly had I hung up when it rang again.
accepted: Hardly had I hung up when it rang again.
Scarcely had I hung up when it rang again.
No sooner had I hung up than it rang again.

options: It was her persistence that won them over.

It was her persistence won them over.

items.prompt: Completa la oración hendida:
items.text: ___ I really need is a straight answer, not excuses.

pairs: It was the timing that mattered
What surprised me was his calm
introduce la información nueva al final

explica la causa de forma enfática

items.prompt: Arma la frase hendida: "Lo que más me molestó fue su tono."

items.value: It was in 2019 that everything changed

accepted: What really matters is how you respond.
What truly matters is how you respond.
What really matters is the way you respond.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: It was the silence that unsettled me, not the words.
It was the silence what unsettled me, not the words.
It was the silence unsettled me, not the words.
items.value: It was the silence that unsettled me, not the words.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: What the committee failed to grasp was the urgency of the situation.

lessons.title: Inferencia de actitud
lessons.topic: Inferir actitud e implicación en textos

items.prompt: Lee: "I suppose the proposal has its merits, though I'd hardly call it groundbreaking." ¿Qué da a entender el hablante?
options: No está realmente impresionado.
Está totalmente convencido.
Rechaza la propuesta por completo.
items.value: No está realmente impresionado.

items.prompt: Lee: "She conceded, begrudgingly, that he might have a point." ¿Qué se infiere?
options: Admite el argumento de mala gana.
Está encantada de darle la razón.
Niega rotundamente su argumento.
items.value: Admite el argumento de mala gana.

items.prompt: Lee: "Far be it from me to criticize, but the figures simply don't add up." ¿Qué implica?
options: Va a criticar pese a fingir lo contrario.
Se niega por completo a opinar.
Cree que las cifras son correctas.
items.value: Va a criticar pese a fingir lo contrario.

items.prompt: Empareja la frase con la actitud que sugiere:
pairs: I'm sure you did your best
It's not that I disagree, exactly

items.prompt: Completa para sugerir reticencia (inversión):
items.text: Little ___ they know how close the deal was to collapsing.
accepted: did
items.value: did

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés usando énfasis (cleft/inversión): "No solo lo sabía, sino que no dijo nada."
items.source: No solo lo sabía, sino que no dijo nada.
items.value: Not only did he know, but he also said nothing.
accepted: Not only did he know, but he also said nothing.
Not only did he know, but he said nothing.
Not only did she know, but she also said nothing.

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: Little did they realize what was at stake.
Little they did realize what was at stake.
Little did they realized what was at stake.
items.value: Little did they realize what was at stake.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: Much as I admire her ambition, I remain unconvinced by the plan.

options: Under no circumstances should you sign without reading it.

Under no circumstances should sign you without reading it.
checkpoint.value: Under no circumstances should you sign without reading it.

checkpoint.prompt: Lee: "The service was, shall we say, less than impressive." ¿Qué implica?
options: El servicio fue malo, dicho con eufemismo.
El servicio fue excelente.
El hablante no llegó a probar el servicio.
checkpoint.value: El servicio fue malo, dicho con eufemismo.

checkpoint.text: ___ struck me most was how calmly she handled the crisis.

checkpoint.value: At no point did they mention the cost

checkpoint.source: Fue su silencio lo que más me preocupó.
checkpoint.value: It was his silence that worried me most.
accepted: It was his silence that worried me most.
It was her silence that worried me most.
It was his silence that worried me the most.

checkpoint.prompt: Empareja la estructura con su efecto:
Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: Only then did I grasp the full extent of the problem.
Only then I did grasp the full extent of the problem.
Only then did I grasped the full extent of the problem.
checkpoint.value: Only then did I grasp the full extent of the problem.

checkpoint.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: What he resented was being kept in the dark.
What he resented were being kept in the dark.
What he resented was been kept in the dark.
checkpoint.value: What he resented was being kept in the dark.

checkpoint.text: Seldom has a single decision had such far-reaching consequences.
